resources.string: Please watch the ad until it finishes!
The app will be force stopped. Unsaved data will be lost.
Root and Shizuku not detected. All features are unavailable.
Clean app cache when Apply is pressed
Improve touch screen responsiveness (Root: kernel boost, Shizuku: pointer speed)
Block background notifications for this app
Force app into doze & limit background activity
Root required · Active while app process is running, resets when app is closed.
Processes already running cannot be undone. Apps already compiled remain saved.
Huge thanks to all the amazing contributors who helped develop this project.
Root active — full logcat, dmesg, processes available
Shizuku — limited logcat, per-package filter available
App not running or no data available.
You closed the ad before it finished. Progress was not counted. Watch the ad to the end for progress to be recorded.
Watch %1$d ad videos to unlock access for 1 day, or upgrade to Premium for full access forever.
Watch the ad until the end. If closed early, progress will not be counted.
Snapshot of all current JavaPro + Game Board + App Profile + App Ops settings.
Apply GameBoost settings when a game from game.txt is opened
Game \"%1$s\" detected but no tweaks selected. Go to Gamelist → select game → enable tweaks.
ROOT REQUIRED — Presets can be saved but cannot be applied.
Replace the home screen banner with a photo from your gallery. JPG and PNG formats supported. Ideal ratio 16:9 — photos with a different ratio will be auto-cropped to center.
Floating pill · tab label appears when active
Access system logs, crash reports, per-app resource info, and in-depth troubleshooting.
Chart paused. Press Resume to record again.
More accurate detection requires root access
Package not found or not installed.
Give CPU and memory priority to this game
Change the GPU renderer backend for this game. Changes take effect after restarting the game.
Set performance governor + max frequency, supports Adreno & Mali
Force foreground & top-app CPU utilization to maximum
Pre-render frames before display, reduce visual jitter
Speed up UI transitions during gaming
Lock screen refresh rate to target FPS
Prevent Android from entering power-saving mode during gaming
Freeze thermal zones + freeze thermal daemon
Maintain stable performance, prevent throttling during long sessions
Force Low Memory Killer to free RAM more aggressively
Route interrupts to performance cores for lower latency
Stop all background apps to free RAM
Increase Adreno GPU DVFS aggressiveness (Snapdragon only)
Keep GPU active longer, reduce re-ramp latency
Disable WiFi sleep & scan throttle for low WiFi latency
Enable TCP fast open, SACK, timestamps + force mobile data always on
Set none scheduler + rq_affinity for low latency
High performance, low latency, power saving
Optimize sched latency, granularity and child runs
Wide compatibility, stable on most GPUs
Legacy mode, suited for older games
Clear system cache to free RAM
Stop all background apps to free RAM
DexOpt speeds up app launching. Side effect: storage size increases. Do not close JavaPro while the process is running.
Optimize swappiness, dirty ratio and page cluster
How aggressively the kernel uses swap. Device default: %1$d
Percentage of dirty memory before writing to disk. Default: %1$d
Number of pages read from swap at once (0=off). Default: %1$d
Controls how quickly the kernel drops cache. Default: %1$d
Amount of data read ahead from storage. Default: %1$d KB
Sync files to disk after writing. Disable for better performance, risk of data loss on crash.
Change ZRAM compression algorithm, LZ4/ZSTD are faster than default

DexOpt will recompile %1$s.

⚠ Storage size will increase.
⏱ This may take a while.
🔒 Do not close JavaPro.
Tap to copy. This Device ID is sent automatically when pressing the Buy button.
Premium has expired. Please renew your subscription.
Enjoy JavaPro without ads. Choose a package, click Buy to contact the developer via Telegram, and enter the provided activation key.
Hello, I would like to purchase the Weekly package ($0.63)\nDevice ID: %1$s
Hello, I would like to purchase the Monthly package ($1.25)\nDevice ID: %1$s
Hello, I would like to purchase the Yearly package ($2.67)\nDevice ID: %1$s
Hello, I would like to purchase the Permanent package ($4.67)\nDevice ID: %1$s
Hello, I need help activating my premium key\nDevice ID: %1$s
Key is invalid, expired, or not for this device.
Root not detected. All tweaks require root access.
New stable version ready to install
Free update · Your data is safe
Activate a license to unlock Pro features
Send your Device ID to the admin to get premium activation.
Drop page cache to free up RAM instantly
This will reset all tweaks, color calibration, and profiles to default. This action cannot be undone.
Please use automatic DNS to access this app. Access denied due to AdBlock or Private DNS usage.
Watch 6 ads to get 1 day of premium
%1$d of %2$d ads watched · This week: %3$d/%4$d claims
Already claimed. Next in %1$d h %2$d min.
You\'ve claimed %1$d×/week. Resets Monday in %2$d days %3$d hrs.
This feature is for Premium users only.\nBuy Premium or get free access via Weekly Reward.
Enable network to continue this feature
Ad not available, please try again in a moment
Server is down, try again later.
Ad verification pending, please try again in a moment
This feature is only available on rooted devices.
Your device must be rooted to use this feature.
This feature requires a Premium account.
Watch the ad until the end to apply the spoof.
Failed to apply spoof. Make sure root is active.
Do With Your Own Risk — This feature modifies system properties directly. Any risk that arises is entirely the user\'s responsibility.
Only applies until the next reboot
May affect device detection in games
Spoof device model, chipset, and fingerprint
Spoof has been reset to default.
Spoof "%1$s" will be active after reboot.
Spoof will be disabled after reboot.
Waiting for reboot to apply spoof changes.
Health data not available on this device
Charge Limit & Schedule require root access
Automatically stop charging when battery reaches the set limit. Extends long-term battery cell lifespan.
Sysfs charge limit path not found on this device
Enable charging only within a specific time window. Useful to keep battery healthy during overnight charging.
Show real-time battery status in the notification panel. Includes overheat, low battery, and charge limit alerts.
Overheat, low battery, and charge limit alerts
Temperature reached %.1f°C. Consider reducing load or removing case.
Battery is low. Please charge your device.
Battery reached the %d%% charge limit. You can unplug now.
All battery history data will be deleted.
Accurate, uses system API. Requires root.
Reads from SurfaceFlinger. No root needed.
This method requires READ_FRAME_BUFFER permission. Grant via: adb shell pm grant %s android.permission.READ_FRAME_BUFFER
This method requires READ_FRAME_BUFFER permission. Already granted automatically via root (see javapro_grant.sh).
Usage Access permission is required for Non-Root FPS mode. Please grant it in the next screen.
You can download up to %d configs per day to maintain server stability.
Cloud Configs is an exclusive feature for Pro users. Upgrade now to access hundreds of community-shared performance tweaks.
Download up to 5 configs per day
Watch the ad until the end to download this config.
Watch 2 ads per download · Max %1$d downloads/day. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited access.
Download & apply configs shared by other users
Automatically clean background RAM while gaming
Unlock Auto-Clear RAM and all exclusive automation tools with Premium
This feature requires Root or Shizuku
Your screen is %1$dHz — %2$sfps exceeds your display\'s capability. Recorded frames will be duplicated, not new data.
Your screen is %1$dHz — %2$sfps is the maximum for this device
Please sign in with Google before purchasing
You will be redirected to Sociabuzz. Make sure the message field is already filled. Premium will be activated automatically after successful payment.
Your payment is being processed by the system. This usually takes a few seconds to a few minutes.
Thank you! Your %1$s package is now active. Enjoy all JavaPro Pro features!
Don\'t panic! If you already paid, your payment will still be processed. Try checking again in a few minutes.

Payments received outside 07:00–15:00 AM (Mon–Fri) will be processed today too from 04:00 PM.

Saturday & Sunday processing can be faster.

Your premium will still be activated, don't worry!
You transfer on Saweria/Sociabuzz with the pre-filled message
The system automatically receives payment notification from Saweria/Sociabuzz
Email %1$s is instantly granted %2$s premium package
Reopen the Premium page in JavaPro to load the latest status
💡 Make sure you don\'t change the donation message so your email is automatically detected by the system.
Your premium status will be re-checked on next login.
Connect your Google account to verify your JavaPro premium status.
For Indonesian users · Bank transfer, GoPay, OVO, DANA, etc
For international users · Credit card, PayPal, global methods
The donation message is pre-filled automatically. Do not change it so your premium can be activated automatically.
This name is only displayed in the app.
For Indonesian users · Bank Transfer, GoPay, OVO, DANA, etc
For international users · Credit card, PayPal, global methods
Donation message is pre-filled automatically. Do not change it so premium can be activated automatically.
